name: Active Business Computer Software Royalties Exclusion

eligibility.description: Corporation must derive at least 50% of ordinary gross income from software royalties and R&D/business deductions must exceed 25% of ordinary gross income.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes software royalties from personal holding company (PHC) income if the corporation is actively engaged in developing, manufacturing, or producing software.
